observations: Uses dynamic PORT fallback suitable for hosted container platforms.

compose.api: Builds local app, mounts source volume, loads .env.development, runs uvicorn --reload.

missing_or_unclear: No explicit Render service config found.
No documented healthcheck path in deployment config.
No worker count/runtime process guidance found.

notes: CORS_ORIGINS is not required even for production.
SESSION_TTL_SECONDS env is currently not used by session_store.

startup_process: run_startup_checks validates PostgreSQL and Redis at import time.
FastAPI lifespan starts Redis listener task.
Application serves HTTP endpoints and WebSocket endpoint.

health_checks.behavior: Runs SELECT 1 against DB and returns status/db scalar.

deployment_risks: Synchronous Redis and SQLAlchemy usage can limit async throughput.
In-memory WebSocket connection manager is sensitive to multi-worker/multi-instance deployment.
No API rate limiting or WAF guidance detected.
No container healthcheck or non-root user configured.
Startup checks at import time can make deployments fail before lifecycle logging/readiness starts.
